jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Zappfresh - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Zappfresh! We are hiring a Marketplace Manager for our Raipur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Zappfresh:
Zappfresh is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zappfresh!
